overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character walking through a futuristic corporate lobby. The character passes a large alien aquarium display beneath an 'Accelcorp' sign and proceeds toward an elevator exit in a clean, neon-lit interior environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate lobby with alien aquarium display

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the large aquarium tank, observing the alien marine specimens floating inside

entered.detail: illuminated corporate signage with green lettering mounted high on the wall
massive glass enclosure containing various alien marine creatures and coral formations
bioluminescent sea creatures and floating lifeforms visible inside the aquarium
large leafy plants in metallic planters flanking the aquarium display
tall vertical light fixtures running floor to ceiling along the corridor walls
white curved desk with a seated figure working behind it

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic corporate lobby beneath an illuminated Accelcorp sign. To the left, a massive aquarium tank displays alien marine life, while vertical neon light strips illuminate the metallic corridor. The reception desk sits to the right as the character moves steadily forward.

events.description: passing the end of the aquarium display and entering the elevator lobby area

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the elevator exit, passing a framed planetary artwork on the left wall

entered.detail: large framed image depicting a ringed planet against a starfield background
metallic sliding door with illuminated frame leading to the exit
red illuminated sign reading EXIT mounted above the elevator door
modern white couch positioned against the right wall near the elevator
single large potted plant situated near the elevator entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving past the aquarium, the character enters an elevator lobby featuring a large planetary artwork on the wall. The camera approaches a metallic elevator door marked with a red EXIT sign, passing a white sofa and vertical neon fixtures that now frame the corridor more prominently.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile corporate lobby that transitions into a focused elevator exit. It begins beneath an illuminated Accelcorp sign, gliding past a massive aquarium filled with alien marine life and a reception desk set against metallic corridors. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the open lobby into a more enclosed elevator area, passing a white sofa and vertical neon fixtures that frame the path. The camera then approaches a large planetary artwork on the wall before finally centering on a metallic elevator door marked with a red EXIT sign.
